---
title: "Flights Analysis"
date: "2016-09-30"
author: "Kivan Polimis"
description: ""
categories: [how-to]
image: ""
draft: false
---

{{< embed ../../../downloads/notebooks/flights_analysis.ipynb >}}

{{< embed ../../../downloads/notebooks/flights_analysis.ipynb >}}
